author: ESPN YouTube
text:
ELIMINATION GAME 🍿 Kentucky vs. West Virginia | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Baseball
Watch the highlights as the West Virginia Mountaineers defeat the Kentucky Wildcats, 6-5, in extra innings of the Morgantown Regional. Armani Guzman hit a walk-off RBI single in the 10th inning to secure West Virginia’s place in the Super Regionals.
